text:
[libgit2-sys 0.16.2+1.7.2] Package dependency requirement 'libgit2 < 1.8.0' could not be satisfied.
[libgit2-sys 0.16.2+1.7.2] Package 'libgit2' has version '1.8.1', required version is '< 1.8.0'
